Requirement_Summary: Develop and maintain a cybersecurity strategy prioritizing critical system and national infrastructure protection per NCA
Evidence_Examples: Cybersecurity strategy document, NCA alignment evidence, board approval records

Requirement_Summary: Conduct annual risk assessments and maintain monthly-reviewed risk register for critical systems per NCA CSCC
Evidence_Examples: Risk assessment reports, risk register, review cadence evidence

Requirement_Summary: Integrate security requirements into IT project management including secure development testing and deployment
Evidence_Examples: SDLC security procedures, DevOps security configs, code review evidence

Requirement_Summary: Conduct annual cybersecurity reviews by cybersecurity function and independent audits every three years
Evidence_Examples: Audit reports, review records, third-party findings, remediation evidence

Requirement_Summary: Implement personnel screening and vetting for workers with access to critical systems
Evidence_Examples: Background check records, vetting procedures, access provisioning evidence

Requirement_Summary: Harden VM configurations apply security baselines disable unnecessary services and check for missing updates
Evidence_Examples: VM baseline assessments, hardening evidence, update status reports
Azure_Policy_Name: Machines should be configured to periodically check for missing system updates

Requirement_Summary: Implement VNet segmentation and isolation for workloads using network security groups
Evidence_Examples: VNet configs, NSG rule sets, network topology diagrams
Azure_Policy_Name: Subnets should be associated with a Network Security Group

Requirement_Summary: Encrypt all storage at rest using strong government-approved encryption with customer-managed keys
Evidence_Examples: Disk encryption status, CMK configs, Key Vault access policies
Azure_Policy_Name: OS and data disks should be encrypted with a customer-managed key

Requirement_Summary: Enable secure boot and TPM capabilities on virtual machines for hardware-level integrity
Evidence_Examples: VM security configs, secure boot status, attestation logs
Defender_Recommendation: Enable secure boot for virtual machines

Requirement_Summary: Implement API gateway with authentication authorization and rate limiting for all exposed APIs
Evidence_Examples: API Management configs, authentication policies, rate limit logs
Defender_Recommendation: Secure APIs with authentication and throttling

Requirement_Summary: Enable database encryption audit logging and disable public access for all database services
Evidence_Examples: Database configs, audit logs, public access status reports
Azure_Policy_Name: Azure SQL Managed Instances should disable public network access

Requirement_Summary: Scan container images for vulnerabilities and enforce pod security policies
Evidence_Examples: Container image scan results, security policy configs, vulnerability reports
Azure_Policy_Name: Containers running in Azure should have vulnerability findings resolved

Requirement_Summary: Implement least-privilege and secure secret management for serverless functions
Evidence_Examples: Function app configs, Key Vault access policies, managed identity evidence

Requirement_Summary: Classify all data per NCA and NDMO sensitivity classification guidelines before cloud deployment
Evidence_Examples: Classification tags, sensitivity labels, classification policy evidence

Requirement_Summary: Apply data masking and anonymization for non-production environments containing sensitive data
Evidence_Examples: Masking configs, test data policies, environment separation evidence

Requirement_Summary: Store all data in compliant geographic regions per Saudi data localization requirements
Evidence_Examples: Region configs, storage account locations, data residency compliance reports

Requirement_Summary: Enforce data retention policies and secure deletion procedures per NDMO data lifecycle standards
Evidence_Examples: Retention policies, deletion logs, lifecycle management evidence

Requirement_Summary: Implement federated identity with SSO capabilities aligned with national identity infrastructure
Evidence_Examples: SSO configs, federation trust relationships, identity provider evidence

Requirement_Summary: Implement just-in-time privileged access with approval workflows and comprehensive audit trails
Evidence_Examples: PIM configs, JIT access logs, approval workflow evidence

Requirement_Summary: Secure monitor and rotate service account credentials and managed identity configurations regularly
Evidence_Examples: Service principal configs, credential rotation logs, managed identity evidence

Requirement_Summary: Conduct periodic access reviews and certifications for users with access to critical systems
Evidence_Examples: Review logs, access certification records, remediation evidence

Requirement_Summary: Enable DDoS protection for all internet-facing government and critical infrastructure services
Evidence_Examples: DDoS protection configs, mitigation logs, service coverage evidence

Requirement_Summary: Deploy WAF with OWASP rules for all public-facing web applications and APIs

Requirement_Summary: Use private endpoints for all PaaS services to eliminate public internet exposure

Defender_Recommendation: Secure cloud services with private endpoints

Requirement_Summary: Implement comprehensive network traffic monitoring flow logging and threat analysis
Evidence_Examples: Flow logs, traffic analytics dashboards, network watcher configs

Requirement_Summary: Centralize security logs to a SIEM for correlation alerting and incident investigation

Azure_Policy_Name: Enable logging by category group for resources to Log Analytics

Requirement_Summary: Integrate threat intelligence feeds and share indicators with national cybersecurity authorities

Requirement_Summary: Automate security response and remediation for known threat patterns and policy violations

Requirement_Summary: Continuously scan and remediate vulnerabilities within NCA-mandated timelines

Azure_Policy_Name: System updates should be installed on your machines (powered by Azure Update Manager)

Requirement_Summary: Map controls to applicable Saudi frameworks including NCA CSCC NDMO and PDPL requirements
Evidence_Examples: Control mapping matrices, compliance attestations, framework coverage evidence

Requirement_Summary: Enable comprehensive audit logging for all administrative data access and configuration change events

Requirement_Summary: Generate and maintain compliance reports and evidence packages for regulatory submission

Requirement_Summary: Obtain and maintain third-party certifications and attestations required by NCA for critical systems

Requirement_Summary: Implement automated and tested backup and recovery procedures for all critical systems and data

Requirement_Summary: Establish data governance authority define CDO and Data Steward roles and implement oversight policies per NDMO

Requirement_Summary: Enable standardized data exchange between government entities using NDMO-approved standards

Requirement_Summary: Establish formal data sharing agreements defining responsibilities security requirements and usage restrictions
